php.title: Armstrong Number
php.code:
<html>
<body>
<form method="post">
Enter Number:
<input type="text" name="n">
<input type="submit">
</form>
<?php
if($_POST){
$n=$_POST['n'];
$sum=0;
$t=$n;
while($t>0){
$r=$t%10;
$sum=$sum+$r*$r*$r;
$t=$t/10;
}
if($sum==$n)
echo "Armstrong Number";
else
echo "Not Armstrong";
}
?>
</body>
</html>

php.title: Fibonacci Series
php.code:
<html>
<body>
<form method="post">
Enter Limit:
<input type="text" name="n">
<input type="submit">
</form>
<?php
if($_POST){
$n=$_POST['n'];
$a=0;
$b=1;
echo $a." ".$b." ";
while($a+$b <= $n){
$c=$a+$b;
echo $c." ";
$a=$b;
$b=$c;
}
}
?>
</body>
</html>

php.title: Perfect / Deficient / Abundant Number
php.code:
<html>
<body>
<form method="post">
Enter Number:
<input type="text" name="n">
<input type="submit">
</form>
<?php
if($_POST){
$n=$_POST['n'];
$sum=0;
for($i=1;$i<$n;$i++){
if($n%$i==0)
$sum=$sum+$i;
}
if($sum==$n)
echo "Perfect Number";
elseif($sum<$n)
echo "Deficient Number";
else
echo "Abundant Number";
}
?>
</body>
</html>

php_sngc.title: Armstrong Number
php_sngc.code:
<html>
<title>Armstrong Number</title>
<body>
<form method="post">
Enter the Number:
<input type="number" name="number">
<input type="submit" value="Submit">
</form>
<?php
if($_POST) {
$number=$_POST['number'];
$a=$number;
$sum=0;
while($a !=0)
{
$rem=$a%10;
$sum=$sum+($rem*$rem*$rem);
$a=$a/10;
}
if($number==$sum)
{
echo"Yes $number an Armstrong number";
}
else
{
echo("$number is not an Armstrong");
}
}
?>
</body>
</html>
